title: README updates for Windows

changes_required: Drop the 'Linux X11 only for now' line (current line 31)
Replace tagline with: 'Local Whisper dictation for Linux and Windows.'
Add Windows install section with PowerShell one-liner
Update 'Where files live' table with Windows paths

new_install_section_outline: Quick install (winget + PowerShell): one-line iwr|iex command
Manual install: install winget prereqs, clone, run scripts/build-whisper.ps1, npm install, npm run tauri build
Pre-built release: link to GitHub Releases page (will exist after T11/T12), download .msi or .exe and run
Note on SmartScreen: unsigned installer triggers warning — instruct user to click 'More info' -> 'Run anyway' until code signing is added
troubleshooting_additions: Windows: paste does nothing -> some apps (elevated apps, secure desktop) reject SendInput from non-elevated sender. Run target app non-elevated.
Windows: SmartScreen warning -> see install section.
Windows: Vulkan build fails -> ensure LunarG Vulkan SDK installed and VK_SDK_PATH set.
steps: Edit README.md replacing the Linux-only tagline and roadmap line
Insert ## Windows install section after current ## Install
Append Windows row to 'Where files live' table
acceptance: Both Linux and Windows install paths discoverable in <30s of scanning
